top_signals.title: Housebuilder Bellway warns mortgage rate hikes dampening housing demand
top_signals.summary: Bellway has said that recent rises to mortgage rates as a result of the Iran war are dampening demand for housing, on top of rising building cost inflation due to the conflict. The FTSE 250 housebuilder said it has seen a “moderation” in customer demand in April and May, bringing an end to a “positive” [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Who calls the shots? Trump and Netanyahu clash over war goals
top_signals.summary: US president’s frustration with continued Israeli attacks on Lebanon and Iran erupts as he pushes to end the war

top_signals.title: U.S. says BYD, Baidu, Alibaba and other tech giants are aiding China’s military
top_signals.summary: The move could inflame tensions between both countries, coming less than a month after a summit between their leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Perplexity plans IPO in 2028 regardless of what happens to Anthropic or OpenAI, CEO tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK's GSK to acquire U.S. drugmaker Nuvalent for $10.6 billion
top_signals.summary: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.
